title: Research blocks — shape, functionality, and placement design
question: What shape should a .project/research.json block take to capture the factual and analytical substrate under decisions — covering lifecycle, grounding, staleness, citations, cross-layer traceability, and prompt composability?
scope: analysis/ directory (7 existing markdown research artifacts)
Muni five-layer model as reference frame
findings_summary:
Research is the factual and analytical substrate under decisions — distinct from specification (what we chose), findings (problems discovered), feedback memory (distilled rules), and domain knowledge (stable glossary). Research runs across all five Muni layers with different cadence per layer: L1 (project-lifetime, stable), L2 (per-design-cycle), L3 (per-feature), L4 (per-task, ephemeral), L5 (post-incident, accumulator).

Designed shape: flat .project/research.json collection with per-entry layer tag and type tag (investigative, comparative, empirical, historical, audit, landscape, feasibility, curation). Each entry carries: question, method, scope, findings_summary (300–800 words, self-contained, prompt-injectable), findings_document (path to full markdown), grounding (version-pinned dependencies, git revisions, dated external refs), stale_conditions (explicit invalidation triggers), citations (labeled source pointers with file+line or URL+retrieval-time), and informs/informed_by edges for cross-artifact traceability.

Placement decision: one flat collection with cross-references, NOT research embedded inside decisions or features. Rationale: some research informs multiple artifacts (R-0001 informs DEC-0001 AND DEC-0003); research has its own lifecycle orthogonal to what it informs; research must be queryable across layers. Back-reference convention: every artifact that cites research carries a research_sources array.

Lifecycle: planned → in-progress → complete → (stale | superseded), with revised as transient re-investigation state. User-gated: stale → in-progress requires user authority when cited by an enacted decision. Surfaced new framework gap FGAP-007 (staleness engine): no runtime to automatically fire stale_conditions against current state.

revisions: pi-project-workflows repo state including analysis/ directory as of 2026-04-15

stale_conditions: research.schema.json enacted with different shape than proposed here
Muni five-layer model revised or abandoned as reference frame
Block placement decision reversed (embedded research instead of flat collection)
